title: CCTV Motion Event Rate Anomaly After Hours
app: Custom TA (NVR REST/syslog), ONVIF pull, Hikvision ISAPI HEC, or Milestone connector mapped to listed sourcetypes
spl:
index=physical sourcetype="cctv:motion" earliest=-14d
| eval hour=strftime(_time,"%H")
| where hour<"06" OR hour>"22"
| stats count as motion_events by _time camera_id
| eventstats avg(motion_events) as baseline stdev(motion_events) as sd by camera_id
| where motion_events > baseline+3*sd
description: Motion storms overnight may indicate wildlife, unsecured doors, or mis-tuned sensitivity worth investigating.
value: Prioritizes SOC video reviews and reduces false quiet.
implementation: (1) Normalize per-camera cadence. (2) Exclude wind/foliage masks via VMS. (3) Feed short clips workflow.
grandmaExplanation: We watch the physical data center for power, cooling, environment, and physical access.
knownFalsePositives: Sensor anomalies during cleaning, calibration, or planned environmental changes.
